---
title: "Project Status Report — Custom-CMS"
subtitle: "Reporting Period: 2026-W05 · 2026-01-16 to 2026-01-29"
date: "2026-01-29"
author: "Marcus Morrisey"
client: "PCFS"
docket: "PD25-1186-CO"
format:
  docx:
    reference-doc: _templates/report-template.docx
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
---

# Project Status Report

| | |
|---|---|
| **Client** | PCFS |
| **Project** | Custom-CMS |
| **Docket #** | PD25-1186-CO |
| **Project Manager** | Marcus Morrisey |
| **Reporting Date** | 2026-01-29 |
| **Start Date** | 2025-11-17 |
| **Planned Finish** | 2026-03-31 |
| **Estimated Finish** | 2026-03-31 |

## Health Dashboard

| Indicator | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Overall Health | 🟡 Yellow |
| Schedule | 🟡 Yellow |
| Scope | 🟡 Yellow |
| Budget | 🟡 Yellow |
| Client's Feeling | 🟢 Green |

## Project Status & Dates

**Project Status:** Iteration 1 design advanced substantially this period: a comprehensive stakeholder wireframe review with intake and after-hours directors (Jan 23) resolved numerous open design questions, and a full technical specification walkthrough with the development team (Jan 28) finalized the data model and interaction patterns. Client sentiment is strong. However, the original mid-January pilot target was not achieved, contact list development experienced 2–3 weeks of delays, and new target dates have not yet been established. Campfire infrastructure provisioning remains unconfirmed.

**Variance:** Planned finish 2026-03-31 → Estimated finish 2026-03-31 (On Track)

## Progress This Period

**Jan 21 — Internal Project Check-In (Marcus, Gabrielle)**

- Emergency contact and address book integration designed: checkbox column allows users to add emergency contacts, foster parents, and guardians to address book
- Search screen redesigned: phone number search added, current stage/status combined into open services column, last updated field added, advanced filters expand inline
- UI conventions established: help text placeholders in all wireframes, record buffering on save, "where to find them" naming for frequented locations, work addresses added for adults, last updated column for stale record identification

**Jan 23 — External PCFS Meeting (Darryl/Intake Director, Edgar Moses/After-Hours Director, Joshua, Gabrielle, Marcus)**

- Full wireframe review with intake and after-hours directors — first deep-dive with service delivery stakeholders beyond Hailey
- Person record creation permissions resolved: only supervisors and admins create full records; field workers collect info and pass to supervisors
- Limited profile approach agreed: emergency contacts, doctors, community contacts stored with name and contact info only; convertible to full profiles when needed
- Minimum required fields confirmed: name (or "unknown") and approximate DOB only; system sends reminder after 1–2 days for incomplete records
- Multiple address support confirmed; ordinary residence designation required for service eligibility; shared custody supported via notes
- Household member visibility requirements clarified: parents and children in household section; non-parental adults tracked separately for after-hours safety assessment needs
- Membership status default set to "pending" to ensure follow-up; membership document upload supported (status cards, letters)
- Manitoba Health dual tracking confirmed: 6-digit registration number, 9-digit personal health ID, and health card image upload
- Reporting requirements surfaced: after-hours call lists, intake reports needed; Edgar requested robust reporting capability
- Data migration approach agreed: migrate all FamCare data with cleanup to remove duplicates; Azure hosting for large data volume performance
- Contact order tracking, search by facility/group home name, wildcard/partial name search, and DOB in search results all confirmed as requirements

**Jan 28 — Internal Iteration 1 Dev Walkthrough (Marcus, Varun, Gabrielle, Sherrylyn)**

- Full Iteration 1 technical specification walkthrough with development team
- Person profile data structure finalized: persistent banner (name, photo, critical warnings, open cases/intakes), Finance/Log tabs hidden from caseworkers
- Deceased date field added; flexible date entry (year only, month/year optional) designed for adoption and incomplete information scenarios
- Address management workflow finalized: start/end dates for history, modal editing, two address line fields, on-reserve checkbox
- Contact information handling specified; legal and preferred names supported
- Genogram and relationship mapping structure designed: up to three generations; reciprocal relationship links
- Household composition logic: generated from shared addresses and relationships; current and historical households
- Critical health information display: prominent notification banner at top of profile with open text fields
- Mobile responsiveness and printer-friendly versions (intake/case files only) requirements documented
- Specification document designated as living document with tracked changes

## Milestones & Schedule

| Milestone | Baseline End | Estimated End | Status | Variance |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|--------|----------|
| M-01 — Stage 1: Discovery and Requirements complete | 2025-12-22 | 2026-02-12 | Delayed | +52d |
| M-02 — Stage 2: Solution Design complete | 2026-01-31 | 2026-01-31 | At Risk | On time |
| M-03 — Stage 3: All 9 iterations complete / system ready | 2026-03-31 | 2026-03-31 | On Track | On time |
| M-04 — Go-Live | 2026-03-31 | 2026-03-31 | On Track | On time |
| M-05 — Stage 4: Post-launch support complete | 2026-04-30 | 2026-04-30 | On Track | On time |

```{mermaid}
gantt
  title Milestone Schedule
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  section M-01 Discovery and Requirements
    Baseline  :milestone, 2025-12-22, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-02-12, 0d
  section M-02 Solution Design
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-01-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-01-31, 0d
  section M-03 Iterations Complete
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
  section M-04 Go-Live
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
  section M-05 Post-Launch Support
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-04-30, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, 2026-04-30, 0d
```

## Decisions Made

**Jan 21 — Internal**

| Decision | Made By | Date | Notes |
|----------|---------|------|-------|
| Emergency contacts and caregiver entries added to address book via checkbox column | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Current stage/status combined into single "open services" column showing intake or case status | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Phone number added as search criterion for cases with unknown or misspelled names | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Placeholder instruction text included in all wireframes | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Record input buffered temporarily; saved only on final confirmation to prevent stale records | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| "Where to find them" used as label for frequented locations | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Work address included under address section with type indicator | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Frequented locations as simple table: name, address, comment field | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| Advanced filters expand within search screen rather than navigating to new page | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |
| "Last updated" column included in search results to identify recently modified and inactive records | Marcus, Gabrielle | Jan 21 | |

**Jan 23 — External**

| Decision | Made By | Date | Notes |
|----------|---------|------|-------|
| Only supervisors and admins can create full person records; field workers collect info and pass to supervisors | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Limited profiles supported: name and contact info only required for non-service-recipient contacts | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Only name (or "unknown") and approximate DOB required to create a person record | Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| System sends reminder after 1–2 days if critical fields remain incomplete | Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Multiple addresses per person supported; ordinary residence designation required | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Primary and secondary caregiver roles tracked; terminology to be confirmed with ongoing services | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Parents and children in household section; non-parental adults tracked separately for safety assessments | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Membership status defaults to "pending" to ensure follow-up on unresolved records | Edgar Moses | Jan 23 | |
| Membership document upload supported within membership section and documents tab | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Manitoba Health: 6-digit registration number, 9-digit personal health ID, and health card image upload supported | Darryl, Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Migrate all FamCare data with duplicate cleanup; Azure hosting for performance at scale | Marcus, Gabrielle, Darryl | Jan 23 | |
| Contact order implemented to indicate primary contact preferences | Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Search by group home/facility name to list associated children | Edgar, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Date of birth included in search results to disambiguate records | Darryl, Marcus | Jan 23 | |
| Wildcard/partial name search supported | Darryl, Marcus | Jan 23 | |

**Jan 28 — Internal Dev Walkthrough**

| Decision | Made By | Date | Notes |
|----------|---------|------|-------|
| Finance and Log tabs hidden by default; visible to finance team, directors, admins only | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Persistent top banner: name, photo, critical warnings, open cases/intakes visible across view/edit modes | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Deceased date field included to prevent age incrementing for deceased individuals | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Flexible date entry: year, month, day each optional to handle adoption and incomplete data scenarios | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| System supports both legal and preferred names with indication of which is used for contact | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Modals used for adding/editing addresses, phones, emails, relationships; do not close without explicit action | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Address history tracked with start and end dates; ordinary residence determinable for service eligibility | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Mobile-responsive layouts for complex tables; printer-friendly versions for intake and case files only | Marcus, Varun, Gabrielle | Jan 28 | |
| Offline functionality deprioritized per director and frontline feedback | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Search returns full profiles by default; advanced filter enables limited profile inclusion | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Limited profiles convertible to full profiles; system prompts for required fields based on relationship type | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Genogram captures up to three generations with reciprocal relationship links | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Household generated from shared addresses and relationships; current household members and roles displayed | Marcus, Varun | Jan 28 | |
| Critical health info in prominent notification banner at top of profile with open text fields | Marcus, Varun, Gabrielle | Jan 28 | |
| Specification document is a living document; changes tracked via comments and highlights | Marcus, Varun, Sherrylyn, Gabrielle | Jan 28 | |

## Action Items & Commitments

| # | Owner | Item | Due Date | Status | Carried Over? |
|---|-------|------|----------|--------|---------------|
| A-036 | Ross Gillingham | Stand up test environment with IP whitelisting for IDFusion access | 2026-01-31 | Open | Yes |
| A-050 | Hailey | Consult caseworkers to clarify which tasks are performed on mobile devices | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-055 | Hailey / Marcus | Clarify and document requirements for role-based access, high-profile cases, and conflict-of-interest restrictions | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-077 | Hailey | Finalize gender identity, sex assigned at birth, and pronouns field options per Stats Canada standards | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-078 | Marcus | Prepare field-definitions Excel template (tab per screen, field names, dropdown values, rules column) | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-079 | Barry / Bev | Provide exact Sage 300 version/build number for integration documentation | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-080 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Incorporate Jan 23 stakeholder feedback into wireframes: search results (DOB, wildcard/partial name, facility/group home search), address format updates (line 1/line 2, on-reserve checkbox), open services column, and help text placeholders | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-081 | Marcus | Consult ongoing services to resolve pending field decisions: SIN placement, caregiver role terminology, household member requirements for safety assessments, and critical health info categorization | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-082 | Marcus | Establish new pilot target dates to replace missed mid-January deadline; prepare status update for Jaren and Rob with technical challenges and revised timeline | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-083 | Marcus / Varun | Complete Iteration 1 development: deceased date field, flexible date entry, modal editing behavior, address start/end dates, household/genogram logic; conduct detailed dev walkthrough with team | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-084 | Marcus | Source standardized municipality/community list for address dropdown with manual addition capability; investigate on-reserve address automation feasibility | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-085 | Marcus | Obtain stakeholder alignment on sensitive data handling (SIN strategy: person profile vs. case/finance tab); document access and deletion protocols in spec | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-086 | Marcus | Confirm survey skip logic requirements with client; document decision | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |
| A-087 | Gabrielle / Marcus | Follow up with Stanis for Iteration 1 feedback; schedule ongoing services meetings for remaining field clarifications | 2026-02-12 | Open | No |

## Issues & Risks

| # | Description | Severity | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|---|-------------|---------|-------|----------|--------|
| I-011 | Campfire infrastructure delayed — environments email sent; Campfire has not yet confirmed provisioning start date | Medium | Marcus / Ross | 2026-01-31 | Open |
| I-018 | Finance/Sage integration requirements incomplete — Sage version/build not received, coding structure not formally documented, integration design not yet started | Medium | Hailey / Marcus | 2026-01-29 | Open |
| I-020 | Phase 1 scope not formally bounded — feature prioritization exercise complete but written scope boundary document not yet produced | Medium | Hailey / Marcus | 2026-01-29 | Open |
| I-029 | Pilot timeline slippage: original mid-January pilot target missed; contact list work experienced 2–3 weeks of delays due to recurring bugs requiring repeated fixes; new target dates not yet established | High | Marcus | 2026-02-12 | Open |
| I-030 | Sensitive data field strategy undefined: SIN, Manitoba Health numbers, and other sensitive identifiers need placement decisions (person profile vs. case/finance tab); security, data minimization, and reporting needs must be balanced; no stakeholder consensus yet | Medium | Marcus | 2026-02-12 | Open |
| I-031 | Ongoing services field clarification gap: multiple field definitions, terminology, and data placement decisions require consultation with the ongoing services team before Iteration 1 specification can be finalized and scope boundary document produced | Medium | Marcus / Hailey | 2026-02-12 | Open |

## Return to Green Plans

### Overall — Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W48)

- Establish new pilot target dates and communicate revised timeline to all stakeholders (A-082).
- Produce written Phase 1 scope boundary document once ongoing services field clarifications are received (A-081, I-031).
- Confirm Campfire infrastructure provisioning start date (I-011).

### Schedule — Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W48)

- Establish new pilot target dates to replace missed mid-January deadline (A-082); lock into project spreadsheet.
- Complete Iteration 1 development and dev walkthrough (A-083) to restore schedule momentum.
- Confirm Campfire environment provisioning timeline (I-011).

### Scope — Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W50)

- Obtain ongoing services field clarifications (A-081) to finalize the Iteration 1 specification.
- Produce written Phase 1 scope boundary document once clarifications are complete (I-020, I-031).

### Budget — Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W50)

- Obtain Sage 300 version/build number (A-079) and formal coding structure from finance to define finance integration scope and effort.

## Next Period Plan

1. Establish new pilot target dates and send status update to Jaren and Rob with revised timeline and technical context (A-082).
2. Finalize Iteration 1 field definitions with ongoing services: SIN placement, caregiver terminology, household member requirements, critical health info categorization (A-081, A-085).
3. Complete Iteration 1 wireframe updates based on Jan 23 feedback and conduct dev walkthrough with Varun (A-080, A-083).
4. Source municipality/community list and resolve on-reserve address logic (A-084); confirm survey skip logic (A-086).
5. Confirm Campfire environment provisioning start date with Rob/Ken; close I-011 or escalate.
